parameters.query:
SELECT 
  order_id,
  customer_tier,
  product_line,
  defect_type,
  root_cause,
  resolution_code,
  lot_number,
  created_at
FROM quality_records
WHERE created_at > '2024-01-01'
AND archived = false
LIMIT 10000

parameters.subject: =New Training Job: {{ $json.clientName }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO training_runs (client_name, model_name, status, training_examples, duration_minutes, drive_link, created_at)\nVALUES ('{{ $json.client }}', '{{ $json.model }}', '{{ $json.status }}', {{ $json.training_examples || 0 }}, {{ $json.training_time_minutes || 0 }}, '{{ $json.drive_link || '' }}', NOW())\nRETURNING id;
